title: Fire breaks out at warehouse in Vijayawada, no casualties reported
description: A fire broke out at a warehouse in Vijayawada on Wednesday morning. Fire officials said no casualties were reported.

title: Heavy rain causes waterlogging in Hyderabad, traffic affected
description: Several roads in Hyderabad saw waterlogging after heavy rain, causing traffic disruption.

title: Bridge collapse reported near Rajahmundry after heavy rainfall
description: Officials said traffic was diverted after a bridge section collapsed near Rajahmundry. No deaths were reported.

title: Food poisoning suspected at hostel in Warangal, students hospitalised
description: Several students were hospitalised after suspected food poisoning at a hostel in Warangal.

title: Power outage hits parts of Gachibowli after transformer fault
description: Residents in parts of Gachibowli reported power supply disruption after a transformer fault.
